creator: rfg@tristatelogic.com
text:
I looked into this some more and found that in fact. the www.graphviz.org
web site is alive and well and (now) is working properly for me.  Thus, I 
have now been able to fetch the dist file from that site.

Apparently (as confirmed by my research) there was a trasient DNS glitch
(relating to the name servers for FIBERTRANSIT.COM) which was causing
www.graphviz.org to temporarily resolve to 208.91.197.101 rather than to
the correct IP address, 192.20.225.20.  But someone apparently fixed the
glitch, so now www.graphviz.org is back to being usable again.

Still, I am _not_ canceling this PR because ftp.freebsd.org should still
contain a backup copy of the dist file (for graphviz) in order to overcome
situations exactly like this.
